Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Kameira]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 1''' — The Kameira is a creature hunted by Calder that only flies during lightning-storms.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 1''' — The Kameira is a monster that fought on the deck.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 2''' — A Kameira is a creature similar to a lion with a head of sterling silver.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 2''' — The monsters displayed a melding of human and Kameira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 4''' — Kameira are creatures that Greenwardens work closely alongside.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 5''' — Kameira is one of the few who can use certain powers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 6''' — Kameira is something that can be hunted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — The Kameira is a creature that can reduce ships to matchsticks during migrations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 17''' — A Kameira has a bright red and spiked claw.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — The Kameira can wield power freely.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — An Elder-tainted baby Kameira's alchemically preserved heart was used as a jewel in an earring.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — Urzaia's opponent uses a Kameira through her Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The cook fights with the power of a single Kameira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 26''' — Kameira refers to any creature not of human or Elder origin that can manipulate the world in seemingly supernatural ways.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 26''' — Soulbound can call on the powers of Kameira if they hold their Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 28''' — Jarelys Teach returns on her Kameira bird.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Kameira are beings that have lived on the planet as long as humanity or perhaps longer than the Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Kameira take the shape of various animals including birds, fish, serpents, and furred beasts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — All Kameira possess the ability to control the world around them.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 4''' — Kameira of the sky, particularly those shaped like birds or winged serpents, manipulate air or gravity.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 5''' — There are four different Kameira depicted on intricately carved coffins in the sub-basement.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 6''' — Kameira burns exist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — The Imperial Guard integrates parts from Kameira into their bodies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 7''' — A Kameira is a living art work that wings its way toward the Gray Island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — A Kameira is a fast vehicle used for transport.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — The Kameira have natural advantages over man.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Ninety percent of Soulbound use the powers of Kameira in their Vessels.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 10''' — Kameira possess water-controlling powers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 11''' — Kameira in Meia's blood reinforces her body with strength.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 13''' — The walls of the room Shera remembered were carved with Kameira reliefs.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — Kameira is a type of potent natural force.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 14''' — The Kameira is a creature with a huge serpent eye.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 19''' — Kameira are creatures that can fight in the arena.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 20''' — The Kameira is a sea monster that can pull ships.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 20''' — The Kameira is a sea serpent with webbed claws.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 20''' — The Kameira is a living creature that can be ridden.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 20''' — The Kameira is a creature that can dive into the ocean with a flick of its tail.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 23''' — Meia has Kameira inside her.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 24''' — Kameira are entities whose power can reside inside others.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 26''' — The Kameira within Meia resisted her control.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 1''' — A Kameira is a type of creature that Jyrine recognizes from her studies.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 2''' — Kameira is a type of creature or trait associated with draconic eyes.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 3''' — Jerri's Awakened earring bears the mated power of a Kameira and a notorious Elder.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — A Kameira is a slithering creature of liquid and shadow.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 5''' — Champions are capable of tearing giant Kameira apart with their bare hands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 7''' — The sparks seen by Urzaia are not Kameira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 9''' — Kameira are creatures that include Brightwolves, Icewinders, or Hydras.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 9''' — Kameira are creatures that attack villages.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — Kameira is a type of power found in Jerri's Vessel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Kameira modifications exist.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 15''' — Kameira can be wolves.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 17''' — Kameira refers to creatures found on Aion islands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — A Kameira is a large creature that can use its Intent to set things on fire.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — A Kameira is a type of creature.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 19''' — Legend says a Kameira's hide is made of gold scales.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — The staff contains the crystallized heart of an ancient Kameira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — Kameira are creatures hunted by tribes in the Dylian mountain range for their powers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — The Kameira is a blue-scaled creature the size of a bear.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 8''' — A Soulbound must have a measure of power from an Elder or a Kameira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 11''' — The staff used by Maxeus has the blood of a flame-controlling Kameira in it.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — Kameira is a group that the Imperial Guard is capable of fighting.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 16''' — Some Imperial Guards are missing their Kameira parts.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 1''' — Imperial Guards use winged Kameira for surveillance.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — Some Imperial Guards use flying Kameira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 3''' — Kameira possess incredible eyesight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 6''' — Jarelys Teach replaced her heart with a Kameira’s.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 7''' — Alchemists use leashed Kameira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 8''' — A rogue Kameira is a creature that could drive a ship into an island.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 8''' — Kameira can donate sensory gifts.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 9''' — A clash of destructive Intent and a Kameira’s heart can trigger transformations.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 17''' — Kameira is a species of rice that can be alchemically enhanced and blessed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — A Kameira is something Jerri fears.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 21''' — The remaining Intent of the Kameira allows Jorin to use his wings to float.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 23''' — Kameira are creatures that fought on the waves and in the skies.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 4''' — Meia's eyes are normally Kameira orange.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 6''' — A Stonefang is a type of Kameira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 7''' — Kameira can be tamed.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — The coffins in the room are carved with images of different Kameira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — A Windwatcher is a type of bird Kameira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 10''' — Kameira require special care and medication.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — A weapon can be embedded with the sight of a Kameira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 15''' — A Kameira is a creature that can stalk jungle trees while invisible.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — A Kameira is a creature that can drift over the ocean floor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 20''' — Guild members have limbs of Kameira.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 22''' — Messengers arrive on Kameira.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
